requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — IRAM / IEC 62133 and the S-mark
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——IRAM / IEC 62133及S标志
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——IRAM / IEC 62133及S標誌

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs (including power banks) placed on the Argentine market fall under the mandatory electrical-safety certification regime administered by the Secretaria de Comercio (Resolucion 169/2018 and successors), which results in the S-safety mark. Certification is performed by IRAM or another recognized certifying body against the applicable IRAM standards, which adopt the IEC series — for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries this is IEC 62133-2 (and the corresponding IRAM-IEC adoption). The assessment covers abuse testing such as overcharge, external short-circuit, crush, impact, thermal abuse, and forced discharge. Conformity is demonstrated through type testing plus, depending on the certification scheme chosen, ongoing surveillance, and the product must carry the S-mark with the certifier identification before sale.
summary.zh: 投放阿根廷市场的便携式锂电芯及电池组（含移动电源）属于贸易秘书处管理的强制电气安全认证制度（Resolucion 169/2018及后续法规），据此获得S安全标志。认证由IRAM或其他认可认证机构依据适用IRAM标准进行，该等标准采纳IEC系列——对于便携式密封二次锂电芯及电池，即IEC 62133-2（及相应的IRAM-IEC采标）。评定涵盖滥用测试，如过充、外部短路、挤压、撞击、热滥用及强制放电。符合性通过型式试验证明，并视所选认证方案进行持续监督；产品须在销售前加贴带认证机构标识的S标志。
summary.zht: 投放阿根廷市場的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組（含行動電源）屬於貿易秘書處管理的強制電氣安全認證制度（Resolucion 169/2018及後續法規），據此獲得S安全標誌。認證由IRAM或其他認可認證機構依據適用IRAM標準進行，該等標準採納IEC系列——對於便攜式密封二次鋰電芯及電池，即IEC 62133-2（及相應的IRAM-IEC採標）。評定涵蓋濫用測試，如過充、外部短路、擠壓、撞擊、熱濫用及強制放電。符合性透過型式試驗證明，並視所選認證方案進行持續監督；產品須在銷售前加貼帶認證機構標識的S標誌。

standards_or_laws: Resolucion 169/2018 and successors — mandatory electrical-safety certification (S-mark) for low-voltage electrical equipment, Secretaria de Comercio
IEC 62133-2 (as adopted in the IRAM-IEC series) — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications — Part 2: Lithium systems
IRAM standards adopting the IEC framework for electrical-safety certification

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment), with GB 18287 applying to certain mobile-phone batteries. GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but carries national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A test report issued by a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory to GB 31241 is NOT recognised under the Argentine S-mark certification scheme, which requires testing and certification by IRAM or another Argentine-recognized body against the applicable IRAM/IEC standards.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），部分手机电池适用GB 18287。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室依据GB 31241出具的检测报告，在阿根廷S标志认证制度下不被认可；该制度要求由IRAM或其他阿根廷认可机构依据适用IRAM/IEC标准进行检测和认证。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），部分手機電池適用GB 18287。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室依據GB 31241出具的檢測報告，在阿根廷S標誌認證制度下不被認可；該制度要求由IRAM或其他阿根廷認可機構依據適用IRAM/IEC標準進行檢測和認證。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Because both Argentina (via IRAM-IEC) and China (via GB 31241) trace back to IEC 62133-2, the underlying test methods overlap substantially, but the certification routes are not interchangeable. Key gaps for a Chinese exporter: (1) Argentine market placement requires the Secretaria de Comercio S-mark obtained through IRAM or a recognized certifier — a GB 31241 report alone is not accepted; (2) national deviations mean some test severities (e.g., crush, overcharge) may differ and require re-testing or gap analysis to the IRAM/IEC criteria; (3) the S-mark scheme involves certifier marking and may require ongoing factory surveillance depending on the chosen scheme; (4) documentation and product marking must be in Spanish and reference the Argentine certifier. An IEC 62133-2 / CB Scheme report may help streamline IRAM certification but does not by itself confer the S-mark.
gap.zh: 由于阿根廷（经IRAM-IEC）与中国（经GB 31241）均可追溯至IEC 62133-2，底层测试方法高度重叠，但认证路径不可互换。中国出口商的主要差距：（1）进入阿根廷市场须取得经IRAM或认可认证机构办理的贸易秘书处S标志——仅凭GB 31241报告不被接受；（2）国家偏差意味着部分测试严苛程度（如挤压、过充）可能不同，须按IRAM/IEC准则重测或做差距分析；（3）S标志制度涉及认证机构标识，并视所选方案可能要求持续工厂监督；（4）文件及产品标识须为西班牙文并引用阿根廷认证机构。IEC 62133-2/CB体系报告可有助于简化IRAM认证，但本身不授予S标志。
gap.zht: 由於阿根廷（經IRAM-IEC）與中國（經GB 31241）均可追溯至IEC 62133-2，底層測試方法高度重疊，但認證路徑不可互換。中國出口商的主要差距：（1）進入阿根廷市場須取得經IRAM或認可認證機構辦理的貿易秘書處S標誌——僅憑GB 31241報告不被接受；（2）國家偏差意味著部分測試嚴苛程度（如擠壓、過充）可能不同，須按IRAM/IEC準則重測或做差距分析；（3）S標誌制度涉及認證機構標識，並視所選方案可能要求持續工廠監督；（4）文件及產品標識須為西班牙文並引用阿根廷認證機構。IEC 62133-2/CB體系報告可有助於簡化IRAM認證，但本身不授予S標誌。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Secretaria de Comercio electrical-safety certification and the S-mark (Resolucion 169/2018 and successors) are required before market placement of in-scope low-voltage electrical equipment; certification via IRAM or a recognized certifier against IRAM/IEC 62133-2
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Argentine market placement of portable lithium batteries and power banks requires the Secretaria de Comercio S-mark, obtained through IRAM or a recognized certifier against the IRAM-adopted IEC 62133-2 framework. Although GB 31241 and IRAM/IEC both derive from IEC 62133-2, a Chinese GB 31241 report does not by itself confer the S-mark; national deviations may require re-testing, and an IEC 62133-2 / CB report can streamline but not replace IRAM certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 便携式锂电池及移动电源进入阿根廷市场须取得贸易秘书处S标志，经IRAM或认可认证机构依据采纳IEC 62133-2的IRAM框架办理。尽管GB 31241与IRAM/IEC均源自IEC 62133-2，中国GB 31241报告本身不授予S标志；国家偏差可能要求重测，IEC 62133-2/CB报告可简化但不能替代IRAM认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 便攜式鋰電池及行動電源進入阿根廷市場須取得貿易秘書處S標誌，經IRAM或認可認證機構依據採納IEC 62133-2的IRAM框架辦理。儘管GB 31241與IRAM/IEC均源自IEC 62133-2，中國GB 31241報告本身不授予S標誌；國家偏差可能要求重測，IEC 62133-2/CB報告可簡化但不能替代IRAM認證。

source.publisher: IRAM — Instituto Argentino de Normalizacion y Certificacion
